name: MegaFees Dashboard API
description: Static JSON snapshots behind the MegaFees dashboard. No auth is required.
cache: Snapshots are refreshed by the dashboard data workflow. Use cache: no-store when freshness matters.
cors: The repository includes _headers rules for Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * on static hosts that support them.

endpoints.title: Complete dashboard data
endpoints.description: All public MegaFees dashboard datasets in one response.

endpoints.title: Network economics
endpoints.description: USDM supply, M0, M1, lending vault reserves, and demand-deposit components.

endpoints.title: MEGA holders history
endpoints.description: Historical MEGA holder counts and holder-size buckets.

endpoints.title: Brix dashboard
endpoints.description: Brix app dashboard metrics, prices, market-cap series, and summaries.

endpoints.title: Brix token snapshots
endpoints.description: Brix-related token contracts, holders, supply, and transfer snapshots.

endpoints.title: World Markets dashboard
endpoints.description: World Markets spot TVL, exchange balances, lending, fees, and source metadata.

endpoints.title: Euphoria dashboard
endpoints.description: Euphoria transaction, transfer, volume, user, fee, and PnL snapshots.

endpoints.title: HitOne dashboard
endpoints.description: HitOne transaction, transfer, volume, user, fee, and PnL snapshots.
